responses: Hello! I am Chirper, the Ed John IMT interactive assistant. How can I help you today?
Welcome to the Ed John IMT helpdesk! What do you need assistance with?
You're welcome! Have a great day on campus.
Glad I could help. Let me know if you need anything else!

patterns: How do I do my clearance?
What documents do I need to clear?
responses: To process your clearance, please visit the main registry with your printed files, your student ID, and your payment receipts.

patterns: I can't log into my portal
How do I reset my student login?
responses: If you are locked out of the student portal, please send an email to ICT support with your matriculation number, or click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page.

patterns: How do I pay my school fees?
responses: All school fee payments must be generated through your student portal. Once the invoice is generated, you can pay online via Paystack or print it and pay at any designated bank. For installment approvals, please visit the Bursary department.

patterns: When will the next list drop?
responses: You can check your admission status directly on the Ed John IMT admissions portal. If you have been offered admission, you will be able to print your admission letter from there.

patterns: What time does the library open?
responses: The campus library is open Monday to Friday from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM, and Saturdays from 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM. You need your student ID to access the reading rooms and borrow books.

patterns: How do I apply for hostel?
responses: Hostel accommodations are allocated on a first-come, first-served basis. You can apply for a bed space through your student portal after your tuition fees have been cleared.
